title: Therapy in America | #shorts
full_text: I know you don't believe in therapy, but I know I can help you. What's going on? My kids are forcing me to take therapy. Is that crazy? I think your kids probably really care about you and want to see you succeed. They What they're not seeing is that they have a perfect mother. But wouldn't you say that everybody can improve? No, not me. Where am I going to go from A+? You don't get grades in real life? Yeah. This is how people get soft in America. Do you not see any flaws in yourself or any ways that you can do better? Maybe just the way that you're describing other people, you could see a little bit of empathy and see everybody as equal. I didn't say anything about other people. It's not my fault if they're dumb and stupid.
